declarations.description:
Large profile avatar with ring + optional verified badge (Figma **Avatar profile photo** · `1217:108477`).
Sizes **sm** (72px), **md** (96px), **lg** (160px). Verified uses `--color-brand-ui-600`.
declarations.name: BdAvatarProfilePhoto

slots.description: Custom inner content when `kind="image"` and no `src`.

declarations.description:
User avatar (Figma **Avatar** · `19:1012`): image, placeholder icon, or initials; optional status
(online / verified / company). **Blue** verified badge uses `--color-brand-ui-600`.
declarations.name: BdAvatar

slots.description: When `kind="image"` and no `src`, optional custom content inside the circle.

declarations.description:
Badges and chips for labels, status, filters, and removable tags.

- **`pill`** — `border-radius: full` · **`badge`** — `radius-sm` filled tint · **`modern`** — white surface, border, `shadow-xs`, gray label; icons use the palette accent (Figma “Badge modern”).
- **`brand`** maps to **Blue dark** utilities (product blue).
declarations.name: BdBadge

declarations.description:
Checkbox (Figma **Checkbox** · frame `1097:63652`).
Uses native `<input type="checkbox">` with a styled box; `indeterminate` maps to the DOM property.
Checked / indeterminate fills use **blue** (`--color-brand-ui-600`); focus uses `--color-focus-ring`.
declarations.name: BdCheckbox

events.description: `detail: { checked: boolean; indeterminate: boolean }` on change.

Wraps **`bd-radio-group-item`** with `role="radiogroup"`. Set **`name`** on this element

declarations.description:
Card option for radio groups (Figma **Radio group item** `124:2838` + group `1142:87213`).

- **`simple`** — compact row: radio + title / price hint + description (Type **Radio button**).
- **`icon-card`** — header (featured icon + title + square check) and body (display price, badge, text) (Type **Icon card**).

Selected state uses **blue** (`--color-brand-ui-600`). Focus: `--color-focus-ring`.
declarations.name: BdRadioGroupItem

**`variant="default"`** — native `<textarea>` with label, hint / error, resize grip.
